name: MasterCars Auto Sales & Service
description_short: Buy Here Pay Here auto dealership in Atlanta, GA offering in-house vehicle financing for customers with bad credit, no credit, or complex financial histories.
description_long:
MasterCars Auto Sales & Service is a Buy Here Pay Here (BHPH) dealership located at 6972 B Buford Hwy NE, Atlanta, GA 30340. Serving the Atlanta metro area — including Norcross and Doraville — the dealership operates entirely in-house, handling both vehicle sales and financing under one roof without relying on third-party lenders or banks. They offer bilingual service in English and Spanish.

MasterCars provides in-house auto financing directly to buyers, with a stated goal of approving nearly all applicants regardless of credit background. Customers can apply online via a soft-pull prequalification (no credit score impact) or visit in person. Required documents include proof of residence, proof of income (pay stubs or bank statements), and a state ID or passport. Every vehicle sold includes a 24-month/24,000-mile limited warranty covering the engine, transmission, drive axle, cooling system, and air conditioning. Buyers also receive free oil changes and free brake pads for up to three years post-purchase.

What distinguishes MasterCars from typical BHPH lots is the breadth of included perks: the 24-month warranty, multi-year maintenance benefits, a dedicated service advisor for ongoing support, and a $100 referral credit program that rewards existing customers for word-of-mouth referrals. The dealership explicitly targets buyers in difficult financial situations — including those with bankruptcy, child support obligations, self-employment/1099 income, identity theft history, or zero credit — positioning itself as a last-resort option with structured support rather than a bare-bones transaction.

BHPH financing is inherently more expensive than traditional auto loans, and MasterCars does not disclose interest rates or APR on its website, which is a meaningful transparency gap. Payments go directly to the dealership, meaning missed payments carry direct repossession risk. Whether MasterCars reports payment history to credit bureaus — a key factor for credit building — is not stated. This is a legitimate, regulated financing option for buyers with no other path to vehicle ownership, but consumers should request full loan terms before signing and compare total cost of financing carefully.
pros: 24-month/24,000-mile warranty included on every vehicle (engine, transmission, drive axle, cooling, A/C)
Free oil changes and free brake pads for up to three years post-purchase
Soft-pull prequalification — does not affect credit score
Accepts applicants with bankruptcy, child support, self-employment/1099 income, and zero credit history
$100 referral credit applied toward a future payment when a referred customer purchases
Bilingual service available in English and Spanish
Dedicated service advisor for ongoing maintenance guidance
cons: No APR, interest rate, or total loan cost information disclosed on the website
BHPH financing typically carries significantly higher interest rates than traditional auto lenders
Payments made directly to the dealership — missed payments carry direct repossession risk with no bank buffer
Whether payment history is reported to credit bureaus (for credit building) is not stated anywhere on the site
Inventory is limited to what the dealership has on its lot at any given time
best_for: Buyers with no credit history or severely damaged credit who have been denied by banks and credit unions
First-time car buyers lacking an established credit profile
Self-employed or 1099 workers who struggle to document income for traditional lenders
Individuals post-bankruptcy or with other derogatory marks needing immediate vehicle access
diagnosis: MasterCars is best suited for credit-challenged buyers in the Atlanta metro area who need a vehicle and cannot qualify through traditional lenders — particularly those with bankruptcy, 1099 income, or no credit history. The main caveat is that BHPH financing is among the most expensive forms of auto lending, and MasterCars does not publish its rates, so buyers must request full loan terms upfront and calculate total repayment cost before committing.
services: Buy Here Pay Here in-house auto financing
Used vehicle sales with handpicked, inspected inventory
Free oil changes for up to three years
Free brake pads for up to three years
Dedicated service advisor for maintenance support
In-person dealership experience at Atlanta, GA location
